
```{r setup}
# devtools::install_github("samperochkin/hpoltest")
library("hpoltest")
library('data.table')
allData = readRDS('/store/patrick/copernicus/agg/indiaForCC.rds')
allData = as.data.table(allData)
allData = allData[!is.na(allData$ecoRegionInt), ]
allData$sqrtPm = sqrt(pmin(allData$pm,1000))
allData$timeIid = as.numeric(allData$date)
allData$tempClean = pmax(allData$tempd, -10)


cc_design <- ccDesign(strat_vars = c("cell","ecoRegionInt", "yearMonthDow") )


pmKnots = c(0, 1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100, 200, 400) # on square root scale
tempKnots = c(-10, -5, 5, 10, 20, 25, 30)

formula <- count ~ #od(date) +
  hiwp(sqrtPm, p=2, ref_value = sqrt(25), knots = pmKnots, group_var = ecoRegionInt) +
  hiwp(tempClean, p=2, ref_value = 10, knots = tempKnots, group_var = ecoRegionInt)
```

```{r fit}
fit <- hnlm(formula, allData, cc_design = cc_design)
```
